mainEntity.name: Can AstroWarp and Tailscale run at the same time?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. On the tested Flint 3 Mesh Alpha firmware, AstroWarp and Tailscale ran together after restoring Tailscale's UCI settings.

mainEntity.name: Can AstroWarp and ZeroTier run at the same time?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. ZeroTier worked after restoring zerotier.gl.enabled to 1 and restarting zerotier-one.

mainEntity.name: Why do Tailscale and ZeroTier stop after enabling AstroWarp?

acceptedAnswer.text: The GL.iNet management layer may flip their UCI enabled settings to 0 when AstroWarp is enabled or refreshed.
